framework.name: Adyen explicitly backing AP2 as infrastructure play
framework.description: Adyen's Co-CEO publicly positioned AP2 collaboration as extending their mission to provide 'payments building blocks for tomorrow's commerce' and establishing a 'common rulebook' for security and interoperability. This is Adyen's clearest public stance on agent commerce architecture.
framework.raw_quote: Adyen's collaboration on Google's Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) is a natural extension of our mission to provide the merchants with the payments building blocks for tomorrow's commerce.

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
